div.h1: One app that takes you further
div.p: STC Bank enables you to take control of your finances and move further with your personal and business banking.
Send money to a contact, local or international bank with a click

Make a group to split money for
a birthday gift, vacation or anything else.

Learn more about your spending behavior using money
analytics. It will encourage you to save and spend more wisely.
Explore hundreds of digital cards and enjoy an entertaining shopping experience.
Experience the world in a whole new way with ultimate convenience and financial control using STC Bank cards.
Our cards allow you to make secure payments with safeguarding protection.
Learn about your spendings using money analytics to spend wisely.
STC Bank cards are accepted worldwide. Spend and enjoy around the globe!

div.h2: Send gifts to friends and family
div.p: Whatever the occasion, share the joy with a gift. Choose a gift, an envelope, leave a note and make them happy.
